metadata.description: Claude plugins for ideas42 team members

plugins.name: claude-workspace-ops
plugins.description: Migration, project setup, file hygiene, plugin creation, skill lookup, and artifact-review workflows.

plugins.name: pdf-viewer
plugins.description: View, annotate, and sign PDFs in a live interactive viewer. Mark up contracts, fill forms with visual feedback, stamp approvals, and place signatures — then download the annotated copy.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Manage tasks, plan your day, and build up memory of important context about your work. Syncs with your calendar, email, and chat to keep everything organized and on track.

plugins.name: cowork-plugin-management
plugins.description: Create, customize, and manage plugins tailored to your organization's tools and workflows. Configure MCP servers, adjust plugin behavior, and adapt templates to match how your team works.

plugins.name: claude-admin-utilities
plugins.description: Optional memory consolidation, Cowork setup, scheduling, plugin creation, and skill lookup helpers.

plugins.name: product-management
plugins.description: Write feature specs, plan roadmaps, and synthesize user research faster. Keep stakeholders updated and stay ahead of the competitive landscape.

plugins.name: research-evidence
plugins.description: Research, evidence review, writing, concept mapping, agent council, and journey mapping workflows.

plugins.name: slack-by-salesforce
plugins.description: Official Slack MCP server for interactive and collaborative workflows. Surface insights, draft messages, and engage teams directly within Slack from Claude Cowork.

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.description: Create content, plan campaigns, and analyze performance across marketing channels. Maintain brand voice consistency, track competitors, and report on what's working.

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Streamline engineering workflows — standups, code review, architecture decisions, incident response, and technical documentation. Works with your existing tools or standalone.

plugins.name: airtable
plugins.description: Airtable is the database and operations layer for your agents — whether running product, marketing, sales, ops, HR, or a custom business app. It combines structured data with multiplayer visual surfaces (grid, kanban, calendar, gallery, timeline) humans and agents share — plus sync integrations to Jira, Salesforce, Zendesk, Google Drive, and Databricks. Makes Claude fluent in Airtable: bases and schema, records, and collaboration UI. Bundles the official Airtable MCP server.

plugins.name: brand-systems
plugins.description: Brand rules for ideas42, Year Up, Calbright, Bottom Line, and SBNC/Navvy artifacts.

plugins.name: notion-workflows
plugins.description: Optional Notion-backed capture, meeting prep, research documentation, and spec-to-implementation workflows.

plugins.name: communications-learning
plugins.description: Optional internal communications and tutoring/coaching workflows for updates and learning support.

plugins.name: figma-web-dev
plugins.description: Figma implementation, Code Connect, design-system rules, React review, UI review, and visual polish.

plugins.name: document-production
plugins.description: Optional document, Word, PDF, PowerPoint, Excel, and theme support for file-heavy workflows.

plugins.name: desktop-commander
plugins.description: MCP server for terminal commands, process management, and file operations across text files, code, PDF, DOCX, Excel, images, and structured data

plugins.name: connector-automation
plugins.description: Optional connector-dependent automation wrappers for Figma, Miro, Notion, and MCP-building work.

plugins.name: data
plugins.description: Write SQL, explore datasets, and generate insights faster. Build visualizations and dashboards, and turn raw data into clear stories for stakeholders.

plugins.name: figma
plugins.description: Plugin that includes the Figma MCP server and Skills for common workflows

plugins.name: data-evaluation
plugins.description: Dataset cleaning, sample description, lightweight CSV summaries, analysis verification, and HTML visualization.

plugins.name: enterprise-search
plugins.description: Search across all of your company's tools in one place. Find anything across email, chat, documents, and wikis without switching between apps.

plugins.name: learn-with-coursera
plugins.description: Turn any learning intent into a personalized Coursera experience. Asks three quick questions (topic, familiarity, preferred format), searches Coursera's catalog, and delivers the right next step — a course, hands-on project, short video, or live roleplay — then maps a path forward. Requires the Coursera connector for catalog tools.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Accelerate design workflows — critique, design system management, UX writing, accessibility audits, research synthesis, and dev handoff. From exploration to pixel-perfect specs.

plugins.name: artifact-production
plugins.description: Optional web, canvas, theme, GIF, and algorithmic-art production skills for richer deliverables.

plugins.name: miro
plugins.description: Secure access to Miro boards. Enables AI to read board context, create diagrams, and generate code with enterprise-grade security.
